ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fund_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment fund */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration over which performance is measured */,
  "fund_returns" REAL /* Returns of the fund over the specified duration */,
  "category_average" REAL /* Average returns of funds in the same category */,
  "category_best" REAL /* Best returns of funds in the same category */,
  "category_worst" REAL /* Worst returns of funds in the same category */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Return of the benchmark index */,
  "peer_group_performance" REAL /* Performance of the fund's peer group */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the fund */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Expenses associated with the fund */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Turnover rate of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES investment_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment fund */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the fund belongs to */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund was launched */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the fund (e.g., mutual fund, ETF, etc.) */,
  "investment_style" TEXT /* Investment style of the fund (e.g., value, growth, etc.) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the fund (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum amount required to invest in the fund */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee associated with the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_funds_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES fund_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_funds_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., equity, fixed income, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the manager */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment fund */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested in the fund */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_accounts_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES investment_funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the client (e.g., individual investor, institutional investor) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market index on the specified date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the market index on the specified date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening value of the market index on the specified date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest value of the market index on the specified date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest value of the market index on the specified date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing value of the market index on the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_analysis" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk analysis record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment fund */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the fund's returns */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the fund relative to the market index */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value-at-risk of the fund */,
  "expected_shortfall" REAL /* Expected shortfall of the fund */,
  "stressed_value_at_risk" REAL /* Stressed value-at-risk of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_analysis_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES investment_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment fund */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_return" REAL /* Predicted return of the fund */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "upside_potential" REAL /* Upside potential of the fund */,
  "downside_risk" REAL /* Downside risk of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES investment_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to perform the action */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the action */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_authentication" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt value for password hashing */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, client, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who started the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to start the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to start the session */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to start the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_and_events" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., market news, company news, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the research report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the research report was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the research report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "webinars_and_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Speaker(s) at the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
